## Testing
Describe the testing you've done:

## Code Quality Checklist
- [ ] Code follows project style guide
- [ ] All functions are documented
- [ ] No magic numbers (all use named constants)
- [ ] All math uses FloatLib (no JavaScript Number type)
- [ ] Proper error handling added
- [ ] References cited (links to source/spec)
- [ ] No console.log or debugging code
- [ ] No unused imports or variables

## Documentation
- [ ] README updated (if needed)
- [ ] API documentation updated (if needed)
- [ ] Test comments explain what's tested
- [ ] Implementation comments explain why (not just what)
- [ ] References added where applicable

## Risk Management
- [ ] No changes to risk limits without discussion
- [ ] No changes to divergence detection logic without careful review
- [ ] No removal of safety checks
- [ ] Backward compatibility maintained (or breaking change documented)

## Performance Impact
- [ ] No performance regression
- [ ] No new dependencies added (or justified)
- [ ] No unnecessary loops or inefficiency
